_comment: Cloudflare WAF custom-rule set for hardening your OWN agent endpoints (waf-spec §6.1). Import via the Cloudflare API (Rulesets: phase http_request_firewall_custom) or transcribe into Security > WAF > Custom Rules. Rules are evaluated top-down; the first match wins. Replace <…> placeholders before applying.
name: syber-agent-endpoint-hardening

rules._note: For a true rate limit use a Rate Limiting rule (ruleset phase http_ratelimit) with characteristics ip.src + http.request.uri.path, period 60, requests_per_period 100, mitigation_timeout 600.

rules.description: Block AI scrapers hitting the API
